title: Support .taskulus additional project paths
description: If .taskulus exists in cwd or parents to git root, read newline-delimited paths to include in discovery. Resolve relative paths from the dotfile location.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: .taskulus support implemented in python/src/taskulus/project.py (_find_taskulus_dotfile/_discover_taskulus_projects) and rust/src/file_io.rs (discover_taskulus_projects/find_taskulus_dotfile). Verified by features/project/project_utilities.feature (dotfile scenarios) in behave and cucumber.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: .taskulus is read from cwd upward to git root; paths may be absolute or relative; listed project/ directories are included in discovery.
